title: phyllanthus inflatus
intro: Phyllanthus inflatus, also known as the elephant ear vine, is a type of succulent plant native to Southeast Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phyllanthus inflatus include reducing fever, treating skin conditions such as eczema and psoriasis, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infused oil, or dried extract, making it a versatile addition to natural health remedies.
